channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Systemic glucocorticoid immunosuppression near immune checkpoint inhibitor start linked to poorer survival
item.description: 1. Exposure to systemic glucocorticoid immunosuppression (gsISP) close to immune checkpoint inhibitor (ICI) initiation was associated with worse overa...

item.title: Wearable ultrasound patch for high-risk pregnancies could improve care
item.description: Engineers at the University of California San Diego have created a soft, wearable ultrasound patch that can continuously monitor a fetus for hours at ...

item.title: MR Metformin and SGLT2i Now First-Line in Type 2 Diabetes
item.description: Clinicians at the Primary Care Show discuss what revised NICE guidance means for type 2 diabetes management in practice. Medscape News UK

item.title: Global Outbreaks and Travel Vaccination Update
item.description: From rabid seals off South Africa to urban Anopheles stephensi in Africa, shifting vectors and outbreaks mean clinicians must update travel vaccine co...
